about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: Senior QA & Software Engineering Specialist with extensive experience at GBM, specializing in quality assurance, automation testing, and AI-driven testing solutions.
about.paragraph2: Expert in Java and Python development, with a strong focus on building robust testing frameworks, performance optimization, and ensuring software reliability across complex enterprise systems.
about.paragraph3: Passionate about leveraging artificial intelligence and machine learning to revolutionize software testing processes, while maintaining the highest standards of cybersecurity and code quality.
